detail: Cycle-5 Δt-encoding investigation: raw/log/PLE/learned-periodic on construct-valid informative non-monotone Δt; linear+MLP; positive+negative controls; precondition hard gate (cycle-4 fix)

Δt PoC: precondition PASS (best-MLP nonmono 0.838 vs base 0.080); POSITIVE CONTROL FIRES (linear nonmono: learned 0.831, ple 0.692 >> raw 0.458, log 0.106); real-Q (MLP nonmono): ple-log=0.000, learned-log=-0.021 (gap collapses); neg control clean (mono MLP: log-raw +0.107, richer ties log)
README.md + intent review: capacity confound intentional (linear=positive control, MLP=capacity-controlled); log-linear~base is correct; construct-valid by design
Dispatching ml-critic R1 (debate) on cycle-5 Δt-encoding PoC

critic R1: 9 findings. F1(7) learned+MLP more params than log+MLP; F2(6) precondition threshold weak; F3(6) MLP!=GRU proxy; F4(5) raw clip asymmetry penalizes raw; F5(5) 3-seed no CI; F6(4) single U-shape; F7(3) PLR freq convergence; F8(2) co-feature; F9 nit-suppressed
Dispatching ml-defender R1 on 8 non-suppressed findings

defender R1: empirical_test_agreed. F1 REBUT-DESIGN adj3 (asymmetry conservative), F2 adj2, F3 DEFER adj6 (GRU), F4 REBUT-SCOPE adj2 (clip affects raw only), F5 DEFER adj5 (CIs), F6 adj1, F7 adj0, F8 adj0. (Defender confabulated some PoC specifics but rebuttal logic sound)
Stage B round 1: critic-r2 challenges defender R1 (esp F1 conservative-asymmetry claim, F2 positive-control-certifies, F3/F5 DEFER quality)

critic-r2 R1: F1 PARTIAL(5) under-optimization could cause false null (good point); F2 ACCEPT(1); F3 PARTIAL(6) GRU defer; F4 ACCEPT(1) verified; F5 PARTIAL(5) CIs; F6 ACCEPT(2); F7 ACCEPT(0); F8 ACCEPT(0)
Defender R2 round 1: F1 -> DEFER (param-match + convergence-verify at Step 6); maintain F3/F5 DEFER; maintain accepted
Round 1 case verdict empirical_test_agreed: F1/F3/F5 -> ETA (DEFER param-match+convergence / GRU / bootstrap CIs); F2,F4,F6,F7,F8 defense_wins
Stage B round 2: confirm defender DEFERs (F1 param-match+convergence, F3 GRU, F5 bootstrap CIs) resolve residuals -> expect all-ACCEPT early-exit
Round 2: ALL ACCEPT. F1(3) param-match+convergence test sound; F3(3) GRU defer; F5(2) CI-excludes-zero; rest accepted. B.1 early-exit
Converged via all-ACCEPT early-exit round 2; empirical_test_agreed; Step-6 agenda: F1 param-match+convergence, F4 fix raw clip, F5 bootstrap CIs; F3 GRU deferred to the reference model
Gate 1 cycle 5: DEFER tests F1(param-match+convergence-verify), F5(bootstrap CIs); F4 fix raw clip; F3 GRU->reference model; +z-only floor, learned-freq spectrum
Pre-registration drift check cycle 5: experiment dir vs HYPOTHESIS.md

User: PLE must fit on RAW values, not log(Δt) (or both). Fixed: split PLE into ple_raw (standard, on minutes) + ple_log (variant). Also redrew Δt=exp(latent) (no clip, resolves F4 at PoC level). Re-ran PoC: positive control still fires; MLP-row null holds (ple_raw-log -0.006, ple_log-log +0.000, learned-log -0.014). Debate verdict (ETA) carries: change adds a PLE variant + fixes F4, no new fundamental flaw
Pre-registration drift check (post-PLE-correction): experiment dir vs HYPOTHESIS.md
Running Step-6 hardened experiment (6 enc x 2 model x 2 regime x 5 seeds + bootstrap CIs + convergence verify + z-floor)

Step-6 done: POS control fires (learned-raw +0.204*); REALq MLP: ple_raw/ple_log tie log (~0), learned-log -0.022* (WORSE), learned-log_expand -0.020*; convergence verified (learned train-loss 0.0925 < log 0.1034 = overfits not under-trained); neg control clean; z-floor 0.10
CONCLUSIONS.md: powered result - positive control fires; for capable model log suffices (PLE ties, learned periodic -0.022* worse/overfit, verified via train-loss); neg control clean
REPORT_ADDENDUM.md: keep log Δt; don't adopt PLE (ties) or learned periodic (overfits); definitive test = reference GRU swap
Cycle 5 complete (conclusions_only): construct-valid Δt-encoding test with fired positive control; capacity argument confirmed on informative feature; log is sufficient for a capable model
Dispatching report-writer (Mode 2) for cycle-5-only TECHNICAL_REPORT.md (results mode)
report-writer Mode 2: TECHNICAL_REPORT.md (cycle-5-only, results mode); all numbers CI-verified against stats_results.json

Coherence audit passed: 5 artifacts checked (HYPOTHESIS, CONCLUSIONS, README, REPORT_ADDENDUM, TECHNICAL_REPORT); quantitative+claim+recommendation+hypothesis-closure consistent; base-rate target0.08/realized~0.072 benign
Dispatching research-reviewer (Opus, Round 1) on cycle-5 TECHNICAL_REPORT.md + CONCLUSIONS + ADDENDUM

Opus R1: 4 MAJOR (M1 seed-0-only CIs measure within-seed not between-seed noise -> learned-log borderline t~-2.1; M2 PLE-ties needs equivalence margin; M3 overfit mechanism single-seed/no-reg baseline; M4 recommendation overreaches MLP->GRU + operational claims), 7 MINOR. Design praised; inference under-powered for small effects
User approved FULL remediation: M1 seed-level paired CIs, M2 equivalence framing, M3 regularized arm + 5-seed train loss, M4 reframe, minors m5-m11

Re-ran with seed-level paired-t CIs + learned_reg arm: M1 -> learned-log -0.024 [-0.038,-0.010] p=0.009 Holm-sig (PAIRED test confirms, reviewer's unpaired p0.07 was conservative); M2 ple_log equiv to log (within 0.005); M3 OVERFIT EARNED - learned_reg closes gap to -0.004, reg-effect learned-learned_reg -0.020*; pos control fires p0.000; no encoding beats log

Addressed R1: M1 seed-level paired CIs (learned-log -0.024 p0.009 Holm-sig), M2 equivalence (ple_log<=0.005), M3 regularized arm proves overfit (learned_reg-log -0.004), M4 reframe to prudent default + operational-claims-as-expectations, minors m5-m11. Updated CONCLUSIONS.md+REPORT_ADDENDUM.md+figures; regenerating TECHNICAL_REPORT.md
Re-dispatch report-writer (Mode 2) to regenerate TECHNICAL_REPORT.md with R1 remediation
TECHNICAL_REPORT.md regenerated with R1 remediation (seed-level CIs, equivalence, regularized arm, prudent-default reframe, minors)

Post-remediation coherence audit passed: seed-level numbers + learned_reg + prudent-default reframe consistent across CONCLUSIONS/TECHNICAL_REPORT/REPORT_ADDENDUM and match stats_results.json; peer-review MAJORs resolved + documented in PEER_REVIEW_R1 Response

Rewrote TECHNICAL_REPORT.md per user: removed all prior-cycle/experiment-history references and linear narrative; reframed construct-validity rationale as standalone design principle; verified no residual cycle/history terms (only the .py filename remains)

User declined Metaflow promotion and Haiku verification round. Cycle 5 closed: conclusions_only + standalone TECHNICAL_REPORT + Opus peer-review R1 with full remediation (seed-level CIs, equivalence, overfit-earned, prudent-default reframe) + coherence audit passed
Reflowed TECHNICAL_REPORT.md to single-line paragraphs (fix ragged hard-wrap rendering); content/numbers unchanged; headers/tables/lists/captions preserved
